title: Assistant Outsource Manager
description:
Duties and Responsibilities:

- Lead team of Outsource Assistants and Seniors

- Provide guidance to team members

- Book-keeping and preparation of management accounts

- Preparation of Statutory report (Financial Statements and Notes to the accounts)

- Preparation of custom reporting packages based on client requirements

- Where clients are audited, provide support with respect to services provided to the client

- Cash management and payment processing

- GST preparation and filing

- Payroll processing

  • Preparation of payroll details (including calculation of OT, allowances etc.)
  • Payroll disbursement
  • Leave management
  • Preparation of IR8A and IR21

- Handle portfolio of clients, including assignment of jobs to team members

- Responsible for billings and debtor management for portfolio

- Review work by Assistants and Seniors

- Managing team workload to meet client deadlines

  • Where possible or required, this would include negotiation with the client on deadlines and corresponding fee adjustments

- Propose resolution steps for issues that may arise with clients

- Report to director on the following

  • Issues that arise with clients
  • Anticipated issues that may arise (eg Deadline not able to be met)
  • Time spent by team on jobs

Requirements:

- A degree in accountancy and/or equivalent professional qualification

- At least 5 years of relevant experience from a professional services firm in a Business Process Outsourcing (Client Accounting) environment

- Proficient with accounting software

- Meticulous with good accuracy and attention to detail

- Good communication and interpersonal skills

- Good knowledge and understanding of Singapore requirements on accounting, GST and payroll

postedCompany.description: We are a dynamic team of professionals helping our clients in the field of business outsourcing. We specialise in accounts book-keeping, cash management and payroll services. We are constantly seeking motivated and experienced professionals experience in the area of business outsourcing to join our strong and dedicated team.
